title: Friendly Introduction
goal: Introduce yourself with confidence in 30 seconds
prompt: You are meeting a new classmate. Introduce yourself and ask one kind question.

title: Show and Tell
goal: Explain a favorite toy with clear structure
prompt: Describe your favorite toy with a beginning, middle, and ending.

title: Teamwork Idea
goal: Share an idea politely and clearly
prompt: Suggest a game your group can play and explain why everyone will enjoy it.

title: Problem Solving
goal: Explain a simple problem and safe solution
prompt: Your team cannot agree on a game. Explain a fair plan step by step.
